Class CooldownManager

java.lang.Object
dev.agam.skyblockitems.abilities.CooldownManager
public class CooldownManager extends Object
Manages ability cooldowns for players. Stores cooldown end times and provides utility methods for checking and setting cooldowns.

  • Constructor Summary

    static void
    clearCooldown(UUID playerUUID, String abilityId)

    isOnCooldown(UUID playerUUID, String abilityId)
    Check if a player's ability is on cooldown.

    • CooldownManager

      public CooldownManager()

  • Method Details

    • isOnCooldown

      public static boolean isOnCooldown(UUID playerUUID, String abilityId)
      Check if a player's ability is on cooldown.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The player's UUID
      abilityId - The ability ID
      Returns:
      true if on cooldown, false otherwise

    • getRemainingCooldown

      public static double getRemainingCooldown(UUID playerUUID, String abilityId)
      Get remaining cooldown time in seconds.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The player's UUID
      abilityId - The ability ID
      Returns:
      Remaining seconds, or 0 if not on cooldown

    • setCooldown

      public static void setCooldown(UUID playerUUID, String abilityId, double cooldownSeconds)
      Set a cooldown for a player's ability.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The player's UUID
      abilityId - The ability ID
      cooldownSeconds - The cooldown duration in seconds

    • clearCooldowns

      public static void clearCooldowns(UUID playerUUID)
      Clear all cooldowns for a player.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The player's UUID

    • clearCooldown

      public static void clearCooldown(UUID playerUUID, String abilityId)
      Clear a specific cooldown for a player.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The player's UUID
      abilityId - The ability ID
